title: b43 causes panic at ifconfig down / shutdown
description:
This problem did not occur in 2.6.30 through 2.6.30.6
This problem does occur in 2.6.31-rc3 through 2.6.31

When shutting down the system, a panic occurs.

System: PowerMac G4
Distribution: Ubuntu
Kernel is custom built / mainline.

backtrace is:

ssb_device_enable [ssb] (unreliable)
b43_is_hw_radio_enabled [b43]
b43_rfkill_poll [b43]
ieee80211_rfkill_poll [mac80211]
cfg80211_rfkill_poll [cfg80211]
rfkill_poll [rfkill]
